markdown:
The business field of KWT GmbH is manufacturing pipes and fittings for water supply in several plastic materials which positions the company in the construction value chain as a construction material supplier and manufacturer. With the premium manufacturer KESSEL - Leading in drainage - it exists a close and long partnership. With this experience of decades we will transport our success to the future.

**K-Aqua - Leading in water supply.**

html:
The business field of KWT GmbH is manufacturing pipes and fittings for water supply in several plastic materials which positions the company in the construction value chain as a construction material supplier and manufacturer. With the premium manufacturer KESSEL - Leading in drainage - it exists a close and long partnership. With this experience of decades we will transport our success to the future.

K-Aqua - Leading in water supply.

json.company_description: KWT GmbH is involved in manufacturing pipes and fittings for water supply using various plastic materials, positioning the company as a supplier and manufacturer in the construction value chain. It has a close partnership with premium manufacturer KESSEL, known for its leadership in drainage.

summary: KWT GmbH specializes in manufacturing pipes and fittings for water supply using various plastic materials, positioning itself as a supplier and manufacturer within the construction value chain. The company maintains a long-term partnership with KESSEL, a premium manufacturer known for drainage solutions. With decades of experience, KWT GmbH aims to continue its success in the future.
